quote: I'd hire Biruk again and again. He is a very good developer, smart and elegant. His code is high-standard, clean, and written with best practices.

quote: Biruk is easily one of the top professionals I have worked with on Upwork. He is very detail oriented and able to perform calmly under pressure.

quote: Biruk's work is consistently excellent. In addition to implementation, he assisted with design and architecture. His communication is timely, thorough and insightful.

quote: Biruk is an expert in Backend Development. Would hire him again without a doubt.

quote: Biruk truly went above and beyond for this project. He completed everything, came up with amazing suggestions that improved the project, and explained everything very transparently.

quote: Biruk performed every part of this contract extremely well. The task involved a complex, end-to-end encrypted file transfer system. Multiple architectural decisions had to be made and he handled them all.
